MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar/fee waived. Proceedings reported by: Floyd L. Butler, CSR#2518. (212)

MOTION To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Nov-13-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: William Hopkins' MOTION To Be Relieved As Counsel
for PLAINTIFF TERI MARTINEZ

Appearances:
Rachel Hulst of Epstein Becker & Green, 398-3500, appearing via Court Call for defendants
William Hopkins of Wells & Hopkins, 435-5507, counsel for plaintiff and moving to be relieved

This matter was not argued. The Court granted Mr. Hopkins' Motion to be Relieved as Counsel on the following conditions: 1) Counsel must inform his client of this ruling and upcoming events as soon as possible, and 2) Counsel must assist his client with a request to continue her deposition set for Nov-30-2006 if she chooses to make such a request. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Attendance And Testimony At Deposition And Production Of Documents At Deposition
Off Calendar Nov-02-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Attendance And Testimony At Deposition And Production Of Documents At Deposition is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to appear for her deposition on a date to be noticed by Defendant, for a date no earlier than November 27, 2006. The court finds that Plaintiff's failure to appear for deposition was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $1,050, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltf'S Attendance And Testimony At Deposition And Production Of Documents At Deposition
Off Calendar Nov-02-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Albertsons, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Attendance And Testimony At Deposition And Production Of Documents At Deposition is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to appear for her deposition on a date to be noticed by Defendant, for a date no earlier than November 27, 2006. The court finds that Plaintiff's failure to appear for deposition was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $1,050, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltf'S Attendance And Testimony At Deposition And Production Of Documents At Deposition

Notice Of Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Sep-26-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
William R. Hopkins of Wells & Hopkins, LLP, 435-5507, Counsel for plaintiff and moving to be removed

No other appearances on this matter. William Hopkins' Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for PLAINTIFF TERI MARTINEZ was denied without prejudice. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

Notice Of Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Aug-22-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Steven J. Garrett of Epstein Becker & Green, PC, 398-3500, appearing for defendants Albertsons, Inc. and Randy Sentachi

No other appearances on this matter. The tentative ruling was hearing required, and as the moving party did not appear, the Court took William Hopkins' Motion to be Relieved as Counsel for PLAINTIFF TERI MARTINEZ off calendar. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
